title: Solid Glass
description: A quick mod to easily build things out of glass
body:
If you have ever tried to build anything out of glass, you probably know that it's pure pain. So I made this really simple mod to help with that. When you press a keybind (default "P") all glass types turn sold (only visually, game still renders faces behind them, so it won't be much help with reducing lag). All blocks can be "toggled" to appear solid or not in json file in config/solidglass_config.json.
Note: Modded glass is not suppoerted! (and probably won't)
**I made this mod mainly for personal use, so don't expect any updates**
